textByHashes.303b1414f9410b1cd3fb97842227dc5248c58575: Arrr, we be cursed, we be CURSED! It be a curse upon us!
textByHashes.80113dfd4d8a09bb2ce59b671c454559cdd461bb: Aye? D'ye think so? Really? Am I not a picture of health an' beauty?
textByHashes.53d424606e06e0b939b11c10b25a0343dd26e836: I've sailed the seas all my life. I sailed the seas as a man, like I sailed 'em as a boy.
textByHashes.9282db69caab5f1bc4c558e9b516d23a15ee6db1: I even sailed the seas during that tricky phase in between, when ye'r not quite a man yet, but ye'r not really a boy anymore. But I don't want to talk about that bit.
textByHashes.0bfe3bf9bde4ad99be5199004476f82b3c6a14f8: The point I'm makin' is that I know the seas like I know the palm of my hand. I've been to strange lands an' seen things that'll make yer juices turn in yer veins.
textByHashes.8bbb55314e92a4fe02c6236131a9281d6999e0d8: I've seen dancing fish-women, monkey-kings, huge men in turbans from the far West selling treasure maps - you name it, an' I've seen it.
textByHashes.6efc26fe4469332d7f6b8a4d63f750be217b2664: There be more things in the world than ye dreams of in yer fancy book-learnin'! An' most of 'em be hostile. Could be any number of things brought this curse upon us. Demons, evil spirits, anything!
textByHashes.ab785f5778dad5d7959872723e6b34d03f9c5376: Ye be back? Tell me, do those scurvy Corsairs take the curse seriously?
textByHashes.86419ed6c62c3f3e7d406b91ed2a724a371e1e36: Arrr! That'll teach him to meddle with such folk. Colin should stick to what he's good at.
textByHashes.b5d5710d956f8ecf7d17e5fc1d88efa0fcddd309: Arrr chuckie chuckie chuckie! That'll teach him to play with dolls at his age. Dolls can be frightening.
textByHashes.0274e8841ea291eae42a9c049725a1e6d299dae3: Arrr! Ogre women be powerful, an' Arsen be a fool.
textByHashes.48c6f303b9d7d4d7e2683711b69d0088326eed91: Ye be back? Have ye been investigatin' the curse?
textByHashes.a13445bc004c852575f4003effd91ff0e2d7bb5b: Arrr! That be wrong! I were away for a parlay with Captain Tock, an' I didn't eat that dinner at all. The Captain can tell ye so himself.
textByHashes.4bb2314007119e98554c81601a2c917a270eedfb: So it must be a curse. A CURSE!
textByHashes.d4840d50e20232c578654d0bb5a09a07592eb861: Arrr? And what if I did? Can't an old sailor help his crew without interfering young land-lubbers making accusations?
textByHashes.9c81a83fe143b89ebd8677bb0c686c815887822d: Arrr! Too clever ye be... I heard the Captain might kick me off the crew, so I poisoned the dinner, an' acted sick too. Now they think they're cursed, so they'll want me around, wi' my knowledge o' such things!
textByHashes.0632bfa5e0fc203fe3b49be4e245fb6e4e4706c4: But they all think I'm sick, so they'll never believe I'm behind it. [laugh][laugh]!
textByHashes.3255ae0f4039ee694a27ef9a7ec84d7e068ae2a9: Bah! Ye can't even think of a reason why I'd want to poison the crew, so don't bother me with yer accusations.
textByHashes.310a00668ec65fac85c4ef734c58c862c6aa191d: The Corsairs all think I'm sick too, even though I never ate the food. An' ye'll never make me prove that I'm healthy - I ain't gettin' up! So they'll keep believing in the curse.
textByHashes.c355ad2fc51df7603c1973a33c33d836dadb0eee: Ye'll never make me get up! I ain't afraid of cold, nor of wet, nor of anythin' ye can do in here.
textByHashes.c0a363acaffb2f7e7ef7df00381a507e3348d0aa: So long as that old fool, Tock, believes it's a curse, I've nothing to fear from ye flapping yer mouth.
